title: save_block_state atomic 3-way write: prevents tree/witness/tip skew on crash
description: db.rs:1051-1098: save_block_state wraps tree snapshot, all witness updates, and scan_tip advance in a single SQLite transaction. A contributor might suggest saving them separately (simpler code) but ANY non-atomic combination creates scenarios where tip advances but witnesses are stale (notes become unspendable) or witnesses are saved but tip isn't (scanner re-processes blocks with orphaned witnesses). The 3-way atomicity is the correct invariant.
